why.privateText: I file non lasciano mai il tuo browser.

language.toastAuto: Lingua impostata su {name}. Le traduzioni sono generate automaticamente (beta). La qualità può variare.
language.betaNotice: Le traduzioni sono generate automaticamente (beta) per questa lingua. La qualità può variare.

faq.q1: I miei file vengono caricati su un server?
faq.a1: No. Ogni strumento FileFlex funziona interamente nel tuo browser. I file vengono letti localmente ed elaborati sul tuo dispositivo.
faq.a2: Sì. Tutti gli strumenti sono gratuiti senza registrazione né filigrana.
faq.a3: Nessuna installazione richiesta. FileFlex funziona in qualsiasi browser moderno.
faq.q4: Quali formati di file sono supportati?
faq.a4: Gli strumenti PDF supportano file PDF standard. Gli strumenti immagine gestiscono JPG, PNG, WebP e HEIC.
faq.a5: Una volta caricata la pagina, l'elaborazione avviene localmente.
faq.a6: FileFlex non traccia i tuoi file. Analytics e pubblicità solo se accetti i cookie.
faq.a7: Sì. L'interfaccia è mobile e completamente responsive.

pdf-merge.name: Merge PDF
pdf-merge.desc: Combine multiple PDFs into one file.

pdf-split.name: Split PDF
pdf-split.desc: Split a PDF into pages or ranges.

pdf-compress.name: Compress PDF
pdf-compress.desc: Reduce PDF size by downsampling images.

pdf-rotate.name: Rotate PDF
pdf-rotate.desc: Rotate all pages of a PDF.

pdf-delete-pages.name: Delete PDF Pages
pdf-delete-pages.desc: Remove unwanted pages from a PDF.

pdf-to-jpg.name: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.desc: Convert each PDF page to JPG/PNG.

pdf-extract-text.name: Extract Text from PDF
pdf-extract-text.desc: Copy out the text content of a PDF.

pdf-unlock.name: PDF Unlock
pdf-unlock.desc: Remove a password you already know.

pdf-add-watermark.name: PDF Watermark
pdf-add-watermark.desc: Stamp a text watermark on every page.

pdf-add-page-numbers.name: PDF Page Numbers
pdf-add-page-numbers.desc: Add page numbers to a PDF.

pdf-extract-images.name: Extract PDF Images
pdf-extract-images.desc: Pull embedded images out of a PDF.

image-compress.name: Compress Image
image-compress.desc: Shrink JPG, PNG and WebP images.

image-convert.name: Convert Image
image-convert.desc: Convert between PNG, JPG and WebP.

heic-to-jpg.name: HEIC to JPG
heic-to-jpg.desc: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG.

image-crop.name: Crop Image
image-crop.desc: Crop an image to a custom region.

image-add-watermark.name: Image Watermark
image-add-watermark.desc: Stamp a text watermark on an image.

csv-to-excel.name: CSV to Excel
csv-to-excel.desc: Turn a CSV into a .xlsx workbook.

excel-to-pdf.name: Excel to PDF
excel-to-pdf.desc: Turn a spreadsheet into a PDF table.

docx-preview.name: DOCX Preview
docx-preview.desc: Preview a .docx file in your browser.

text-to-pdf.name: Text to PDF
text-to-pdf.desc: Turn plain text into a clean PDF.

markdown-to-pdf.name: Markdown to PDF
markdown-to-pdf.desc: Render Markdown into a styled PDF.

qr-reader.name: QR Reader
qr-reader.desc: Scan a QR code via webcam or image.

zip-create.name: Create ZIP
zip-create.desc: Zip multiple files into an archive.

zip-extract.name: Extract ZIP
zip-extract.desc: Unzip an archive in your browser.

file-rename-batch.name: Batch Rename Files
file-rename-batch.desc: Rename many files, then download as ZIP.
